pr.title: Migrate to canonical dtk-template + copyright cleanup

summary: Foundational PR migrating the project onto the canonical encounter/dtk-template decomp build (configure.py + decomp-toolkit driven split/link/elf2dol, byte-exact to the retail DOL), auto-downloading dtk/objdiff-cli/Metrowerks compilers instead of vendoring them, and stripping copyright-sensitive committed game binary (raw DOL segments, Ghidra project image) plus untracking 7,508 .inc + 23 asm/*.s per-function disassembly files (kept local/gitignored, off the public repo).
decomp_lessons: The retail linker interleaved some translation units (OSException.c's code sits inside OSInit.c's .text range), so dtk cannot carve clean per-file objects there -- per-file splits / matched-C linking for those TUs is infeasible without large de-interleaving work; the build stays all-asm for them and config.libs is empty.

Committed .inc files use a project-specific mwasm inline asm{} include format incompatible with dtk's GNU-as asm; regenerating them from the ROM would need a custom PPC-to-mwasm disassembler (deferred, not solved here).

Public decomp repos should not commit game-derived binary (raw DOL segments, Ghidra project images) or the full corpus of per-function disassembly (.inc/asm) -- these were removed/untracked and git history for those paths scrubbed separately on master only.
smart_moves: tools/project.py and helpers brought in verbatim from the dtk-template upstream, with configure.py rewritten to the canonical ProjectConfig/generate_build form -- keeps future template upstream merges tractable.
dtk_tag/objdiff_tag/compilers_tag auto-download compilers and tools per-platform instead of vendoring binaries in the repo.

Documented the one intentional divergence from upstream project.py (tools/split_dol.py patches the ldscript debug-stack gap 0x2000 -> 0x8000, the retail value dtk has no knob for) rather than silently forking.
Moved the PC port from src/pcport into its own top-level pcport/ directory so src/ holds only the game's own C, keeping decomp and port concerns separated.
CI (build.yml) repointed to config-validation since the byte-match ninja build needs the (non-public) ROM.

key_files.role: Rewritten to canonical dtk-template ProjectConfig/generate_build form (237 additions, 313 deletions) -- now the source of truth for the split/link/elf2dol pipeline.
Brought in verbatim from upstream dtk-template to drive the canonical build.
Documented one-line intentional divergence from upstream: patches ldscript debug-stack gap 0x2000 -> 0x8000 for the retail value.
Updated to match the dtk-template canonical config shape.
Repointed CI from full byte-match build (needs ROM) to config-validation only.
